title: Bridge Essay: The Prospective Sense of Agency is Rooted in Local and Global Properties of Intr

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nested Agency** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Nested agency — voluntary action, free will as constructed experience, intentional binding.

**The Prospective Sense of Agency is Rooted in Local and Global Properties of Intrinsic Functional Brain Networks.**. J Cogn Neurosci.. PMID: 32530380. DOI: 10.1162/jocn_a_01590. The sense of agency (SoA) refers to aconstitutional aspect of the self describing the extent to which individuals feel in control over their actions and consequences thereof. Although the SoA has been associated with mental health and well-being, it is still unknown how interindividual variability in the SoA is embedded in the intrinsic brain organization.
